title: chassalia leucocarpa
intro: Chassalia leucocarpa is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the white-berried Chassalia or white-fruited Chassalia. The medicinal properties of Chassalia leucocarpa include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Chassalia leucocarpa can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion for medicinal purposes.
